review_target.scope: P0 generation parity narrow fix (r2) on top of conditional metrics layer (r1)

matched: Stop-token set in run_patched_inference_single is the union of tokenizer.eos_token_id, model.generation_config.eos_token_id, and convert_tokens_to_ids("<|im_end|>"|"<|endoftext|>"); negative IDs and unk_token_id are filtered (patcher.py L825-857).
_greedy_continue_with_cache accepts stop_token_ids and unions with eos_token_id via _normalize_stop_token_ids (patcher.py L506-544, L636-638).
Finished-mask discipline: check at top of loop (L658) before next forward, hard-truncation at first stop preserves stop token (L687-701), cache_position = prompt_len + step preserved (L665).
First-token-is-stop corner-case handled (L644-647 — `finished` initialised before loop; truncation step keeps the single stop token).

Sanity-mode no-patch parity gate fires only on clean_no_patch + restoration_no_patch with thresholds Human:>1 ⇒ fail and avg_len_chars>1000 ⇒ fail (run_phase_b.py L496-559); on hard-fail, summary.failure_reason starts with `"sanity P0 parity check failed: "` (L2298-2304) and the failed-branch persistence preserves that prefix over the generic `sanity_check_failed:` prefix (L2375-2389).
Sanity-mode gate is wired AFTER the existing `"Human:-continuation parity skipped (sanity, ...)"` check (L2263) and BEFORE the cross-phase accuracy check (L2322), as per writer description.
phase_b_summary.json carries additive top-level fields `sanity_parity_status` (`passed`) and `sanity_parity_metrics` matching JSONL-derived counts.
Files-to-touch adherence: only stage1/intervention/patcher.py, stage1/run_phase_b.py, stage1/tests/test_phase_b_patcher.py, stage1/utils/wording.py modified in stage1/.

Do-not-touch list intact: none of stage1/inference/runner.py, parser.py, evaluator.py, bds.py, loader.py, run_phase_a.py, run_phase_c.py, composer.py, stage2_confound.yaml, anchor_gate.py, manifest_parity.py, provenance.py, run_status.py appear in git diff --stat.
wording.py r2 delta is 0 (the r1 +11 -0 stands unchanged, confirmed via git diff --stat).

Test coverage: refactored test_no_human_continuation_in_clean_no_patch_smoke (L1026) uses real AutoTokenizer + real PROMPT_TEMPLATE; new test_eos_stop_on_im_end_only (L944) deliberately scalar-mismatches eos_token_id vs the emitted IM_END id and asserts the loop stops via stop_token_ids — would have caught r1 bug; new test_no_second_human_turn_in_no_patch_decode (L1166) defensive twin.

Reproducibility: phase_b_summary.json.environment has seed=42, torch_version=2.11.0+cu126, transformers_version=4.57.6, git_sha=3ebdef9..., cublas_workspace_config=:4096:8, deterministic_algorithms_enabled=true (verified by prior watcher and re-confirmed).
extra: Two additive top-level summary keys (sanity_parity_status, sanity_parity_metrics). Per writer Open-item #3, these do not collide with any §11.1-§11.18 acceptance schema and are set to "n/a (full mode)" in full mode (run_phase_b.py L2148, L2280) so downstream tooling can rely on field presence.

targeted_verifications.A_root_cause_docs: pass (per prior watcher partial; r2 handoff documents the runtime-probe-confirmed root cause: model emits 151643 first; HF generate honors generation_config.eos_token_id list; r1 manual loop only checked the scalar 151645 so missed the stop)
targeted_verifications.B_stop_token_set_completeness: pass (patcher.py L825-857: union of tokenizer.eos_token_id [L827-829], model.generation_config.eos_token_id [L831-833], convert_tokens_to_ids("<|im_end|>"|"<|endoftext|>") [L835-857] with unk_token_id and negative-id filters)
targeted_verifications.C_finished_mask_discipline: pass (patcher.py L644-647 init, L654-659 top-of-loop break, L684-685 set finished, L687-701 hard-truncate at first stop inclusive; cache_position = prompt_len + step preserved at L665)
targeted_verifications.D_sanity_mode_gate: pass (run_phase_b.py L496-559 helper with hard-fail thresholds Human:>1 / avg_len>1000 chars; L2280-2320 wiring on no_patch conditions only; L2298-2304 sets summary.failure_reason starting with `sanity P0 parity check failed: `; L2375-2389 preserves that reason over the generic prefix in the failed-branch persist; gate fires AFTER existing skipped-Human: check at L2263 and BEFORE cross-check at L2322)
targeted_verifications.E_sanity_artifacts: pass (Human: counts: clean_no_patch=0/5, restoration_no_patch=0/5, patch_recovery_full=0/5 [FYI], corrupt_recovery_full=0/5 [FYI]; avg_lengths: clean_no_patch=499.2, restoration_no_patch=293.6 — match phase_b_summary.json sanity_parity_metrics exactly; conditional summary file in §7.2.4-skipped state with phase_b_conditional_summary.SKIPPED.txt present, as expected in sanity mode)
targeted_verifications.F_wording_gate_scope: pass (git diff --stat stage1/utils/wording.py shows +11 -0 only — the r1 contribution unchanged; no r2 edit on wording.py)
targeted_verifications.G_files_to_touch_adherence: pass (stage1 modified set = {patcher.py, run_phase_b.py, test_phase_b_patcher.py, wording.py} — exactly the writer's spec; codex-reviewer.md and notes/* deltas are outside stage1/ and not in the spec scope)
targeted_verifications.H_no_donot_touch_violation: pass (none of the listed do-not-touch paths appear in git diff --stat)
targeted_verifications.I_reproducibility_audit: pass (per prior watcher; environment block in phase_b_summary.json has seed=42, torch_version=2.11.0+cu126, transformers_version=4.57.6, git_sha=3ebdef971675f5eb97b5a5a17e92820a6fda44f5, cublas_workspace_config=":4096:8", deterministic_algorithms_enabled=true; runtime_provenance + dataset.sha256 pin also present)

findings.claim: restoration_no_patch avg_output_length_chars = 293.6 is significantly below the Stage 1 hard_swap_b8 anchor mean (697.9), a 0.42× ratio.
findings.evidence: JSONL probe of results_restoration_no_patch.jsonl: n=5, mean 293.6 chars. Per writer Open-question #2, this is well INSIDE spec §11.6 ≤ 1.25× upper bound but on the low side at n=5. Spec §11.6 lower-bound 0.75× warning fires only on patched conditions (not no-patch), so this is INFORMATIONAL only.
findings.suggested_fix: No fix required for this revision; flag for the operator's full-mode rerun: if restoration_no_patch length << 0.75× Stage 1 anchor reproduces at n=250, investigate as a separate length-floor diagnostic (the only stop IDs added are 151645 and 151643, exactly what HF generate uses, so over-stopping is structurally implausible).

can_ship_with_followup: Operator full-mode rerun of `python -m stage1.run_phase_b --config stage1/configs/stage2_confound.yaml` is required to exercise the spec §11.4 / §11.5 / §11.6 hard gates against the canonical Stage 1 anchor; sanity-mode result is a strong predictor but not a substitute (writer Open-item #1).
Watch restoration_no_patch length ratio in the full rerun — sanity smoke shows 0.42× of Stage 1 anchor; investigate only if the full run reproduces << 0.75× at n=250.
rationale: r2 targets the exact runtime-probe-confirmed root cause: model emits 151643 (<|endoftext|>) first; HF generate honors model.generation_config.eos_token_id == [151645, 151643]; the r1 manual loop only checked the scalar 151645. r2's union-of-three-sources stop-token set, top-of-loop finished check, and hard-truncate-at-first-stop are bytewise-equivalent to HF generate. Sanity smoke shows 0/5 Human: continuations on both no-patch conditions and 499/294-char means — well inside the spec §11.6 1.25× cap of the Stage 1 anchors (676.7 / 697.9). The narrow fix is sufficient to expect spec §11.4 / §11.5 / §11.6 acceptance on the operator's full clean rerun.
